body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features molten gold spiky protrusions that glow with internal heat, while the stubby legs are encased in ember-scaled armor plating with charcoal black accents. The bulbous eyes shimmer with crimson red irises and deep obsidian pupils, and the tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage. Magma-cracked skin texture covers the body, revealing glowing orange fissures beneath the surface, with smoke trails subtly curling from joint areas.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with crimson ember sparks and glowing orange core.
